summary: Bug fix verification complete: Mobile App Preview Assets display bug fixed. All 4 requested features tested and working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile App Preview Assets bug is fixed. Navigation: PIN 9988 -> Admin-Portal button -> R&D tab -> Mobile App Vorschau -> Demo-Daten einfügen -> Anmelden -> Assets tab in bottom nav.

Mobile_App_Preview_Assets_Tab.description: Assets are now correctly displayed in Mobile App Preview after login
Mobile_App_Preview_Assets_Tab.evidence: Screenshot shows '100 Assets gefunden' with list of assets including MUCT01-02-KIT, TSRID-SCA-TSR-0001, etc.
Mobile_App_Preview_Assets_Tab.bug_fix_verified: loadAssets() now correctly accesses result.data.assets instead of result.assets

Mobile_App_Preview_Login.description: Demo-Daten einfügen button fills credentials, Anmelden button works
Mobile_App_Preview_Login.evidence: App Status shows 'Eingeloggt als admin@tsrid.com' after clicking Demo-Daten einfügen then Anmelden

Mobile_App_Preview_Dashboard.evidence: Shows 'Willkommen zurück, System Administrator' with Systemübersicht: Geräte 216, Online 216, Standorte 207, Kunden 2, Mitarbeiter 3

Asset_Management_V2_Bulk_Edit_Checkboxes.description: Checkboxes are present in Assets table and are clickable
Asset_Management_V2_Bulk_Edit_Checkboxes.evidence: Found 51 table checkbox elements. Clicked first row checkbox, shows '1 von 50 ausgewählt' with Massenbearbeitung button visible

navigation_path.step6: Click 'Mobile App Vorschau' in left sidebar
navigation_path.step8: Click 'Anmelden' to login in mobile preview
navigation_path.step9: Click 'Assets' tab in bottom navigation of phone preview
navigation_path.result: 100 Assets gefunden - Assets list displayed correctly
